subcodes.title: Words to the Baha'is, spoken on 1912-11-09
subcodes.first_line: O Lord! We are assembled here in the utmost love and are turned toward Thy Kingdom
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای پروردگار در نهایت محبت مجتمعیم و بملکوت تو متوجه جز تو نخواهیم و غیر رضای تو
subcodes.subjects: @prayer to be recited at table, @power of prayer, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @the concourse on high, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
